'''âk-v-w-y''' ('''kakavweyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moonshine|moonshine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moonshine|moonshine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-v-w-y
|-
! Lemma
| kakavweyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikavweyoko|thikavweyoko]] || [[word:jikavweyoko|jikavweyoko]] || [[word:shikavweyoko|shikavweyoko]] || [[word:kikavweyoko|kikavweyoko]]
